name: BLOCK CONNECTOR
short_description: You are the block and now you have to connect the colourful blocks to defeat your enemy, the polyhedron.
detailed_description:
BLOCK CONNECTOR is a casual game with a very simple rule: connect blocks of the same colour, so even people who are not good at puzzle games can easily start playing.

We didn't use a game engine, but used our own library.

No need to think too much, just simply match the colours and keep defeating the boss, the polyhedron!

This is a slightly new puzzle game that retains the fun of existing dropout puzzles while adding its own originality, so you can play it with a fresh sensation.

We hope it will help you pass the time!
